title: pyrus subuniflora
intro: Pyrus subuniflora, also known as the Chinese pear or Chinese mountain ash, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus subuniflora include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Pyrus subuniflora include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
